review_text: On the listing day, the stock was not visible on the Groww app for around 10 minutes after it went live on the exchange. During the same time, it was available for trading on other brokerage platforms. This delay prevented me from entering at my intended price. For active traders, even a few minutes matter. I hope necessary improvements are made to avoid such delays in future listings.

I have many reasons for not choosing groww 1. Brokerage on equity delivery 2. Worst customer and product support 3. Very less new feature updates 4. No resolution to the issues even after months 5. Wrong OI data in 915 platform

(1) When will you give basket trade option for equity trading? Currently available only for F&O trading. I need to move to 5paisa app for that only. (2)I forgot my password. And for resetting password the OTP comes after time has expired. Send OTP to mobile number. Email option is very slow. I have exhausted all my attempts. Hope it is resolved already.
Excellent app. Kindly give Bull bear power indicator, break down screener (S1,2,3,4,5) similar to breakout screener. Also long shot tool in groww's own chart.
they have made Groww useless app !! there is no other way to sell your stocks in GTT order other than DDPI which I don't want to use. they are making user pay for that too !!

I am very upset with customer support whose delay has resulted in financial loss to me. My Groww app hanged from 2.30pm onwards today while I was trying to redeem mutual funds. I tried relogging but it didn't help. I immediately called customer care but after 5-6 minutes the executive just stopped talking to me and transferred my call to IVR. I opened Customer Support chat at 2.46 pm but they could resolve my issue by 3.10pm by then I lost opportunity to get today's NAV for no fault of mine.

in starting all thing is good but now I am facing to much glitch and the glitch are posetion terminal got fresed or some time it doesn't show the full balance and the recent case is I book the profit 29 th March and today is 1 aprail in when I check it yesterday it show the balance in afternoon I check it goes in previous balance and I check today the updated balance is showing and now.i want to take my posetion in f&o now I doent showing the balance now who is responsible I lost the opportunit

Suggestion: About adding Widget Dear Developer, if you add this feature widget in the app the user may be very helpful and make interest in Groww App. Scrolling Stock Price Bar Widget 1) In this widget user can add his favourite Stocks/ETF/Fund etc to show its live price 2) The widget may be fully customizable like font, Bar position, colour, Scrolling speed, Size of bar, Background color or transparent. 3)The widget may shown on anywhere in screen or lock screen or both it may be optional.

The biggest issue is frequent technical glitches. During market hours, the app often lags, crashes, or simply doesn’t let you log in or place orders. There have been cases where users couldn’t execute trades or even see their balance during crucial moments, leading to losses

One of the few investment apps that actually feels simple instead of confusing. Clean design, fast transactions, and everything is easy to find. Good for both beginners and regular investors. Makes tracking stocks and mutual funds much more convenient.
Otherwise it's good but lot of improvement needed. 1. Multiple accounts log in or switch accounts 2. Simple Insights to cumulate all data and give decision making power to users.

Key Missing Feature: 2-Leg Orders in Delivery & GTT Groww is great, but lacks 2-leg orders (SL + target) for Delivery & GTT Buy/Sell—available only in Intraday. Busy users miss out on automated exits for long-term trades. Add this ASAP! 🙏

I’m very disappointed with the Grow app. Recently, I received calls from random numbers offering investment services, which was honestly shocking. It made me question whether my contact details are being shared without my consent. User privacy is extremely important, and platforms like this are trusted with sensitive information. Experiences like this completely break that trust. I would strongly recommend being cautious while using this app. If this continues, it’s better to switch to other app

Subject: iPad Version Performance & UI Issues I would like to share my feedback regarding the iPad version of the Groww app. While the platform is efficient and user-friendly on mobile devices, the experience on iPad currently requires improvement. The app interface does not appear to be fully optimized for iPad dimensions. The layout feels stretched and misaligned, which affects usability and overall visual appeal. A dedicated iPad-responsive design would significantly enhance the experience
